org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures

Class FSMTransitionFigure

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.AbstractViewComponent
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.AbstractFigure
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.AbstractModelObjectFigure<E>
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.EdgeFigure<E>
              • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.PolylineEdgeFigure<FSMTransition>
                • org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures.FSMTransitionFigure
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ViewComponent>, Selectable, PropertyOwner, Figure, ModelObjectFigure<FSMTransition>, LinearFeature, ModelObjectView<FSMTransition>, ViewComponent, ViewComponentConstants, PropertyNames, View

    public class FSMTransitionFigure
extends PolylineEdgeFigure<FSMTransition>
    Figure for the transitions of the FSM.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:12
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND

    • Method Detail

      • addAssociatedFigureIntoView

        public CoercedFigure addAssociatedFigureIntoView(String figureId,
                                        CoercedFigure figure)
        Link this view component to another figure in the view. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Specified by:
        addAssociatedFigureIntoView in interface ViewComponent
        Overrides:
        addAssociatedFigureIntoView in class AbstractViewComponent
        Parameters:
        figureId - is the identifier for the associated figure.
        figure - is the figure to add in the view.
        Returns:
        the coerced figure previously associated to the specified name.

      • removeAssociatedFigureFromView

        public CoercedFigure removeAssociatedFigureFromView(String figureId)
        Notifies listeners about the removal of a figure from the view. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Specified by:
        removeAssociatedFigureFromView in interface ViewComponent
        Overrides:
        removeAssociatedFigureFromView in class AbstractViewComponent
        Parameters:
        figureId - is the identifier for the associated figure.
        Returns:
        the removed figure; or null.

      • updateFromModel

        protected void updateFromModel(ModelObjectEvent event)
        Invoked when the associated has model changed.
        Overrides:
        updateFromModel in class EdgeFigure<FSMTransition>
        Parameters:
        event - is the model change event. If null if means that this figure was associated to a new model object.
